healthy_description: Large yellow flowers with brown disk centers. Tall sturdy green stems with large coarse leaves. Vigorous growth.

symptom_guide.symptom: White powder coating on leaves and stems
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine white fungal coating appears on upper leaf surfaces, easily rubbed off
Small orange spots on bottom of leaves with yellow areas on top surface

symptom_guide.symptom: Soft rotting of stems near soil line
symptom_guide.visual_description: Stems become mushy and collapse, white mold growth visible inside stem

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellowing of lower leaves progressing upward
symptom_guide.visual_description: Yellow patches on upper leaf surface with grayish mold on undersides
